entry.summary:
Dairy Queen will be celebrating its annual Free Cone Day on Thursday, March 19, 2026, at participating locations nationwide.
According to a survey conducted by Dairy Queen, "92% of Americans say a free DQ cone would make them happy." The chain gave away 5 million free cones last year. entry.title: Applebee's Offers 50-Cent Boneless Wings Through March 22, 2026 and from April 4 through April 6, 2026
entry.summary:
As a 2026 March Madness promotion, Applebee's is offering a deal where you can get 50-cent boneless wings through March 22, 2026, and again from April 4 through April 6, 2026.
The 50-cent boneless wings deal is only available for takeout or delivery when ordered through the Applebee's website or mobile app. Applebee's Boneless Wings feature crispy-fried breaded pieces of boneless chicken, plain or tossed in a sauce of choice, including Classic Buffalo, Honey BBQ, Sweet Asian Chile, Garlic Parmesan, Extra Hot Buffalo, and Hot Honey Glaze. Bleu cheese or house-made buttermilk ranch dressing is included for dipping. Photo via Applebee's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Bojangles Launches New Triple Double Biscuit and Iced Coffee
entry.summary:
Bojangles launches its new Triple Double Biscuit and Iced Coffee.
The Triple Double Biscuit is a limited-time, basketball-themed breakfast sandwich (because the college basketball season is coming to a close) that features applewood-smoked bacon, scrambled eggs, country-style sauce, and two slices of American cheese, served on a scratch-made buttermilk biscuit. The idea here is that the sandwich has "triple the protein" and "double the cheese" (a triple-double in basketball refers to when a player accumulates double-digit numbers in three different tracked statistics; most commonly points, rebounds, and assists). Bojangles' new Iced Coffee is a permanent menu addition that's available in three flavors: Plain (with or without sweet cream), French Vanilla, and Salted Caramel. Also here for a limited time is the returning Strawberry Cobbler (strawberry topping and icing over a buttermilk biscuit), a 2-for-$5 deal on Country Ham Biscuits, and the seasonal Bojangler Sandwich. Photo via Bojangles. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Carl's Jr. Welcomes New Western Bacon Chicken Sandwich
entry.summary:
Carl's Jr. launches the new Western Bacon Chicken Sandwich as a crispy-chicken sandwich analogue to its signature Western Bacon Cheeseburger. The chain has also revealed an updated dipping sauce lineup for its Hand-Breaded Chicken Tenders starting April 8, 2026.
Available for a limited time through May 12, 2026, the new sandwich features hand-breaded, crispy-fried chicken filet served with two cherrywood bacon strips, American cheese, crispy onion rings, and Western Barbecue sauce on a toasted sesame seed bun. It's the same as a Western Bacon Cheeseburger, only with a fried-chicken filet instead of a beef patty. The Western Bacon Chicken Sandwich is priced at $5.99 at participating locations (the price is especially nice here in Los Angeles, where the regular Carl's Jr. Hand-Breaded Chicken Sandwich costs $11.19). Starting April 8, 2026, the updated chicken tender dipping sauce lineup will include several sauces featured in the chain's burgers and sandwiches, as well as a new sauce and an updated one. The lineup includes:
Diablo Habanero Ranch from the El Diablo Burger. Santa Fe from the Charbroiled Santa Fe Chicken Sandwich. Western Barbecue from the Western Bacon Cheeseburger. New Garlic Parmesan - "Creamy, herby, and cheesy." New Heinz Ranch - "Cool and tangy."
The current dipping sauce lineup includes Ranch, Sweet & Bold BBQ, and Buffalo Sauce. Photo via Carl's Jr. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Shake Shack Offers Free Chicken Shack with $10+ Purchase Through April 1, 2026
entry.summary:
Calling it the "Spring Chicken" deal, Shake Shack is offering a limited-time deal where you can get a free Chicken Shack or Chicken Shack Lettuce Wrap with an order of $10 or more through April 1, 2026.
The deal is good only for orders placed through the Shake Shack website, app, or in-restaurant kiosk using the code "SPRINGCHICKEN". The chain continues to offer its Chicken Sunday deal through June 28, 2026, which is the same deal but only available on Sundays. Shake Shack's Chicken Shack features a crispy-fried chicken breast filet, lettuce, pickles, and buttermilk herb mayo on a toasted potato bun. Prices vary, but it normally costs $9.49 here in Los Angeles. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Einstein Bros. Adds Hot Honey to Menu
entry.summary:
Einstein Bros. Bagels leans into the hot honey trend with the launch of its new Hot Honey Cream Cheese Shmear.
The new schmear offers a sweet and spicy twist to classic menu items, including: - Hot Honey Egg Sandwich - Eggs, cheddar cheese, bacon, and Hot Honey Cream Cheese Shmear served on a fresh-baked bagel. - Hot Honey Nova Lox Bagel - Cold smoked salmon, red onions, capers, cucumbers, Onion & Chive Cream Cheese Shmear, and Hot Honey Cream Cheese Shmear on a fresh-baked bagel. You can also get Hot Honey Cream Cheese Shmear on a bagel of your choice. Hot honey is a trending ingredient that has recently featured on the menu at McDonald's, Wingstop, and more. In addition to the new menu offerings, Einstein Bros. also has several limited-time deals available, including: - $10 Baker Dozen & Shmear Box (March Madness deal) - Available when ordering online from the Einstein Bros. Bagels website or app, it includes 13 bagels and two shmear tubs for $10. - $8 Breakfast & Brew - The chain continues to offer this breakfast deal, which includes a Build-Your-Own-Egg Sandwich and large hot or iced coffee for $8. Photo via Einstein Bros Bagels. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes New Andes Green Mint Brownie
entry.summary:
Crumbl introduces the new Andes Green Mint Brownie as part of this week's limited-time rotation. With St. Patrick's Day coming up this week, the lineup features green and rainbows.
Here's the weekly rotation of desserts at Crumbl from March 16 through March 21, 2026: - New Andes Green Mint Brownie - A chocolate brownie embedded with Andes Creme De Menthe pieces, topped with green buttercream, chocolate, and more Andes pieces. - Mallow Creme Cookie featuring Lucky Charms - A warm graham cracker and white drop-packed cookie finished with fluffy vanilla marshmallow frosting and magical Lucky Charms™ marshmallows. - Key Lime Pie Cookie - A chilled graham cookie topped with a zesty lime filling, a rosette of whipped cream, graham cracker crumbs, and a fresh lime wedge. - Cereal Milk Cookie - A warm, cereal-inspired sugar cookie brushed with a milky glaze and topped with colorful, fruity cereal. Oatmeal Cookie Thins will be available for this week's Thin Thursday. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Shake Shack - K-Shack BBQ Burger
entry.summary:
Shake Shack's K-Shack BBQ Burger features a quarter-pound Angus beef patty (or two or three), American cheese, crispy-fried sweet onions, fresh scallions, and Korean BBQ sauce, served on a toasted potato bun.
I went with a double-patty version, which costs $14.29, but made use of the current BOGO deal. Oddly enough, the Double K-Shack BBQ Burger brought to mind McDonald's McArch, which I tried (and reviewed) recently. Both burgers sport a half-pound of beef and a strong onion presence (both feature crispy onions, but the McArch has slivered white onions while the K-Shack contains scallions/green onions).
Perhaps getting the double patty was the wrong way to go, as the Korean BBQ sauce came in as a light touch here. The single-patty version might have been a better showcase for it. If y…

entry.title: Mix-and-Match "Buy-One-Get-One-Free" Deal on Shake Shack's Korean-Style Menu Items Through March 16, 2026
entry.summary:
Shake Shack is offering a limited-time, mix-and-match deal through Monday, March 16, 2026, where if you buy any item from its Korean-Style Menu, you can get a second one free when ordering digitally.
The promotion is good on all Korean-Style menu items, including:
K-Shack Fried Chicken Sandwich K-Shack BBQ Burger K-Shack Spicy BBQ Fries K-Shack Fried Chicken Bites K-Shack Spicy Caramel Shake
To redeem the deal, you need to add any two Korean-Style menu items to an order placed via the Shake Shack website or mobile app, or an in-restaurant kiosk using the code "SPICYSWEET". As is typical of such deals, the cheaper item is free. The BOGO can be used in conjunction with Shake Shack's digital-exclusive $1 sodas, $3 crinkle-cut fries, and $5 classic shakes deals. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Panda Express Launches New Dynamite Sweet & Sour Chicken
entry.summary:
Panda Express has partnered with spicy ramen brand Buldak to launch new Dynamite Sweet & Sour Chicken as the chain's "spiciest dish to date."
The new dish features crispy-fried chicken bites wok-tossed with red bell peppers and onions in a "vibrant, tangy sauce amped up with Buldak's signature fiery heat." Panda Express describes Dynamite Sweet & Sour Chicken's taste as a "'swicy' (sweet and spicy) profile hits with a balanced tanginess upfront, followed by an intense, lingering burn." Each order includes a free Buldak Original Hot Sauce Stick (while supplies last) to add heat as you like. The new entree was tested in select cities in August 2025, and the national run is available now through May 25, 2026, while supplies last. Dynamite Sweet & Sour Chicken is priced in line with the chain's regular entrees (i.e., no premium upcharge). Prices vary by location. Photo via Panda Express. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Krispy Kreme's 2026 St. Patrick's Day Donuts Arrive
entry.summary:
Krispy Kreme has rolled out its 2026 St. Patrick's Day donuts to participating locations across the US. The donut chain is also offering a deal where you can get an Original Glazed dozen for 13 cents with the purchase of any dozen donuts at regular price on Friday, March 13, 2026.
This year's St. Patrick's Day Collection is now available through Tuesday, March 17, 2026, and includes: - Shooting Shamrock Donut - An Original Glazed donut dipped in green vanilla-flavored icing, topped with light green icing loops and a shamrock sugar piece. - Over the Rainbow Donut - A shell donut filled with Original Kreme, dipped in light green vanilla-flavored icing, topped with shamrock rainbow sprinkles and a rainbow sugar piece. - Plaid Party Donut - An Original Glazed donut dipped in vanilla-flavored icing, topped with green icing drizzles. - Chocolate Iced with St. Patrick’s Sprinkles Donut - An Original Glazed donut dipped in chocolate icing, topped with St. Patrick's Day sprinkles. The 13-cent Original Glazed dozen deal at participating locations is available in-person and online for pickup and delivery through the Krispy Kreme app and website using the promo code "13". It's limited to one use per customer. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Applebee's Big Easy Menu Returns
entry.summary:
The flavors of New Orleans are back at Applebee's with the return of the limited-time Big Easy Menu, with prices starting at $11.99.
Applebee's Big Easy Menu includes: - New Bayou Shrimp Bowl (pictured) - Blackened shrimp, Andouille sausage, Spanish rice, garlicky green beans, and sauteed bell peppers & onions with a side of creamy Cajun sauce. - New Big Easy Burger - A beef patty with pepper jack cheese, grilled Andouille sausage, zesty citrus slaw, and spicy honey mustard on a brioche bun, served with classic fries. - Bourbon Street Chicken & Andouille Sausage Penne (pictured) - Bourbon Street chicken, seared Andouille sausage slices, seasoned bell peppers, and onion in a Cajun Alfredo sauce over penne pasta. The menu also includes regular menu items such as the Bourbon Street Chicken & Shrimp Skillet, Bourbon Street Steak, and the Bourbon Street Mushroom Swiss Burger. In addition to the Big Easy Menu, Applebee's readies for St. Patrick's Day with a series of limited-time drinks, including: - New $6 Emerald Escape - Jameson Irish Whiskey, Malibu Coconut Rum, melon liqueur, blue raspberry, pineapple juice, and lime served in a signature Mucho glass garnished with a gold sugar rim. - New $6 Pricklycane - A fruity twist on a NOLA hurricane featuring Bacardi Superior Rum, premium lemon sour, prickly pear, orange, and pineapple juices. Like the Emerald Escape, it is served in a signature Mucho glass garnished with a gold sugar rim. - New $4 Parade Punch Mocktail - A blend of pineapple, prickly pear, blue raspberry, premium lemon sour, and lemon lime soda, garnished with a gold sugar-dusted lemon wedge. Photo via Applebee's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Lucky Charms are Back at Cold Stone Creamery
entry.summary:
In time for St. Patrick's Day, Cold Stone Creamery has brought back its Lucky Charms lineup throughout March 2026. The chain also serves up its 2026 spring menu.
The seasonal Lucky Charms lineup includes:
Lucky Charms Ice Cream - Green-colored, sweet cream ice cream with Lucky Charms cereal. Ice Cream at the End of the Rainbow Creation (pictured) - Lucky Charms ice cream folded with Lucky Charms cereal, whipped topping, and gold glitter. Sprinkled with Charms Shake - Lucky Charms ice cream blended into a shake, crowned with whipped topping, Lucky Charms cereal, and a sprinkle of sparkling gold glitter. Green Waffle Cones Green Waffle Bowls
The 2026 spring menu is available now through May 12, 2026, and includes:
The Lemon Berry Batter Creation - Lemon Cake Batter ice cream folded with Lemon Oreo cookies, lemon pie filling, and strawberries. The Berry Best S'More Creation - Strawberry Marshmallow ice cream folded with fudge, marshmallow cream, and graham cracker pie crust.
Photo via Cold Stone Creamery. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Baskin-Robbins Churns Out New Banana Dulce de Leche Ice Cream and More
entry.summary:
Baskin-Robbins launches new Banana Dulce de Leche ice cream as its March 2026 Flavor of the Month. Additionally, the ice cream parlor chain offers suitably green desserts for St. Patrick's Day, a new Custom Cake in a Box, and a $6 Banana Split Wednesday deal for rewards members.
Baskin-Robbins' Banana Dulce de Leche ice cream is inspired by banoffee pie (a portmanteau of "banana" and "toffee"). The limited-time flavor features frozen banana custard and brown butter ice cream with toffee pieces and dulce de leche swirls. For St. Patrick's Day, the chain has a seasonal St. Patrick's Day ice cream cake as well as its regular-menu Mint Chocolate Chip Milkshake and Pre-Packed Quarts. Through the end of the month, Baskin-Robbins Rewards members can redeem a deal for $5 off a cake of $35 or more. Baskin-Robbins' new Custom Cake in a Box features your choice of cake, ice cream flavor, and toppings. It's a build-your-own option for the previously available Cake in a Box. The $6 Banana Split Wednesday deal is available every Wednesday in March for Baskin-Robbins Rewards members at participating locations nationwide. Prices vary, but a Banana Split normally costs $9.29 at my local Baskin-Robbins location here in Los Angeles. Photo via Baskin-Robbins. Read more at Brand Eating!
